lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Arrrghhh, die man-thing!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Ahhh, it no use, I too sad!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Awww, you poor troll. What seems to be the problem?

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: I love Aga, she so beautiful, she smell so nice, like rotting dead ice wolf!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: But Arrg that... arrrrrg! He together with Aga and he much stronger than Ug. He rip Ug apart!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Who is Aga?

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: She most beautiful troll in world.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Ug want to marry Aga, but she with Arrg!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry now, I'll see what I can do.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You help Ug? You nice, maybe Ug not eat you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errrr... thanks... I think?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I will go and talk to Aga.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: A crying troll who's in love?! This just gets better and better!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hahahahaha... a crying Troll.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I bet all the other trolls laugh at you!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Go away, man-thing, leave Ug alone!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hahahahaa!

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: What you want, man-thing?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Well... you're big and hairy?

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Thanks, me very careful about looks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: (I can't believe I am asking a troll about her love life!!)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... how's your... um... love life?

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: It ok, I with Arrg, he very strong and mighty but sometimes...

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: I not know if he love Aga, He say he will show he love by bringing me flower Trollweiss.

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: It a very rare, beautiful flower, it very special!

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: It grow somewhere in these mountains.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: (Maybe trolls DO have a romantic streak!)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: And Arrg said he would get you the flower?

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: He very strong, if he love Aga he will get Trollweiss.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... what do you think about Ug?

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know that wimpy, crying... nevermind.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr... I've got to go.

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Aga can't wait for Trollweiss. Arrg will show his love!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr... I've got to go.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So... what do you think about Ug?

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Who?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: You know that wimpy, crying... nevermind.

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Whaaaaaaaat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ehh, Excuse me... Mr. Troll, sir,

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did you grow so big and strong?

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Get away from Arrg, puny man-maggot. Or you lunch!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Your girlfriend said you know where to find Trollweiss?

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Girlfriend? Which one?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Errr... Aga.

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Yes, she good cook and wash but talk too many. Arrg strong troll, Arrg mighty troll, Arrg have many girlfriends!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: (What a jerk!)

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, yes, you're great, but what about the Trollweiss?

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: I no know, I just say to make Aga shut up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: So you don't actually know where to find the Trollweiss?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got to go.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You talk to Aga yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, she said that she really wants a certain flower! Trollweiss, I think she called it.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Oh no! Then Ug no chance, Trollweiss not found in years!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Don't worry I'll find it for you!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You no chance, Ug no chance, need someone who live whole life in mountains. Ug no know anyone like that...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hang on a sec...

sections.title: Talking to Ug before finding the flowers

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Have you got flowers yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Sorry, I'm still looking.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Do you know where I can find Trollweiss?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: It has been a long time since someone has asked me about Trollweiss.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: In the old days Trollweiss could be found all over the mountains, but recently it has been disappearing!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: There is one place, where I am sure it still grows, but it is impossible to get to.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing's impossible, if you put your mind to it!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Ahhh, the youth of today. So sure of their prowess. But who am I to stop you from walking into your doom, if that is what you wish to do!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Spare me with the lectures and tell me where to find this flower!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Well, you will need to enter the domain of the ice trolls! This is an area full of wicked beasts and biting cold. From there you will find a way down a slope to a plateau where the Trollweiss grows.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: It used to be easy to get to this plateau, but it is now snowed over and virtually inaccessible. That's global warming for you!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: There must be a way to get there.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: There is maybe one thing...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Go on.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: If you could make some sort of sled, you could probably get down there but I don't know where that would lead you, as you will not be able to go up the mountain again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't sound like a very good idea to me!

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Pah, who are you to talk? Without me you would never have found the secret path to the plateau!!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What would I need to make such a sled?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Well, I'm no expert. Maybe you should speak to someone who knows more about such technical stuff.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Like who?

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: Why don't you ask Dunstan. He's always helped me with my spiked boots.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thank you very much for the information.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got to go.

lines.speaker: Tenzing
lines.text: See you later

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Hi!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hi! Did you want something?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Nothing, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need a sled!!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Haha, very funny! Aren't you a bit old for rolling around in the snow?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: So why do you need a sled then?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need the sled to get to a certain location in the mountains.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hahahaha.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I actually still like rolling around in the snow.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, I guess some of us never grow up!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need the sled to get to a certain location in the mountains.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, since you've helped my family out a couple of times, I'd be glad to build a sled for you.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Let me think...

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Yeah, that should do it. I will need some yew or maple logs, a bar of iron and some rope.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I should have my designs ready by the time you have brought me all the materials

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan again without materials

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Have you got all the materials for the sled yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I haven't got everything yet.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, unfortunately I can't make the sled without all the materials.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Have you got all the materials for the sled yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I have all the materials for the sled.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Well, here's the sled but it will need to be waxed. The wax will need to both protect the sled as well as smoothen it.

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Maybe if you mix some wax with a bit of swamp tar it will achieve the desired effect. You'll also need something to store the wax in... like a cake tin.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get wax from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I don't know. I'm a smith! But maybe you should look for some bees.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get swamp tar from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: The swamp of course! It's south of Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What else do I need?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: You will also need a cake tin to store the wax in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Thank you, come again.

sections.title: Talking to Dunstan again before waxing the Sled

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Hello again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get wax from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: I don't know. I'm a smith! But maybe you should look for some bees.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Where can I get swamp tar from?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: The swamp of course! It's south of Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What else do I need?

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: You will also need a cake tin to store the wax in.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: See you!

lines.speaker: Dunstan
lines.text: Thank you, come again.

sections.title: Talking to Arrg before giving the flowers to Ug

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Aaaarrrrrghhh!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: O-oh, he seems cheesed off...

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Have you got flower yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, I've got it right here.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Thanks man-thing. Ug so happy!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: But me too scared to give Trollweiss to Aga because Arrg will eat Ug for breakfast.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What? So I have to get rid of Arrg as well? After all this trouble I should be the one getting the girl...

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Then again maybe not.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You no touch Aga. Ug kill you.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ok, I'll tell Arrg you said that. Shall I tell him to meet you here?

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: No, no, no, wait! Ug just joke, oh great man-legend. Ug puny, you strong.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I suppose I am a bit of a legend. Ok I'll do it!

sections.title: Talking to Ug before defeating Argg

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You defeat Arrg yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, not yet. Something like this requires careful planning.

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Aga can't wait for Trollweiss. Arrg will show his love!

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Whaaaaaaaat?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Ehh, Excuse me... Mr. Troll, sir,

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I am here to kill you!

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Very good, Arrg was getting hungry.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But not in front of the lady, let's take it outside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Aga deserves better than you.

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: What you mean? Arrg strong troll, Arrg mighty troll. Every troll woman want Arrg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But you don't love her!

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: This concept of 'love' confuses and infuriates Arrg.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Looks like I'm going to have to teach you a lesson in 'love'.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: But not in front of the lady, let's take it outside.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I've got to go.

sections.title: Talking to Arrg after defeating him

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Oh mighty man-warrior, please no hurt Arrg.

sections.title: Talking to Ug after defeating Arrg

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You defeat Arrg yet?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, he has been defeated.

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: You very strong and nice. Take pretty rocks as thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Thanks, Ug. So, now you can go and speak to Aga!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: I too scared.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Has anyone ever told you that you are a useless troll? My grandmother has more guts than you and she doesn't even have her teeth anymore!

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Whaaat? Man-thing want to die? Ug no scared of you or your grandmother! Ug show you. Ug go to Aga now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: How did it go with Aga?

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: I give Trollweiss to Aga and she say it taste very nice. She very happy and we together now.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What?! I went through all that trouble to get a snack for a hungry troll?

lines.speaker: Ug
lines.text: Thank you many for getting Ug together with Aga. We much happy together! I so happy I can't stop crying!

lines.speaker: Aga
lines.text: Thanks for getting Aga and Ug happy. Without you Ug too shy, Aga so in love with Ug!

lines.speaker: Arrg
lines.text: Oh mighty man-warrior, please no hurt Arrg.
